category_sources: source_facts.description says sshportal is an SSH and Telnet bastion server.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives sshportal; source_facts.repo is the official moul/sshportal repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official sshportal documentation page; source_facts.repo provides the official README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/moul/sshportal, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SSH/Telnet bastion-server functionality; source_facts.executables lists sshportal.
